items.title: India’s MoEngage bets that the future of marketing is millions of AI agents
items.summary: The all-cash deal gives MoEngage access to technology that assigns AI agents to individual customers.

items.title: How GPT-5 helped immunologist Derya Unutmaz solve a 3-year-old mystery
items.summary: GPT-5 Pro helped solve a 3-year-old immunology mystery, offering insights into T cell behavior. The breakthrough could support cancer and autoimmune research.

items.title: Anthropic’s Claude Tag is learning your company, one Slack message at a time
items.summary: Anthropic’s new Claude Tag brings an always-on AI teammate to Slack. But beyond productivity, the feature is a strategic play to capture organizational context, institutional knowledge, and enterprise workflows.

items.title: 4 days left to save up to $190 on TechCrunch Founder Summit 2026
items.summary: Four days left to save up to $190 on your pass to TechCrunch Founder Summit 2026 — the ultimate founder bootcamp — before Early Bird rates end on June 26 at 11:59 p.m. PT. Register today.

items.title: Helping build shared standards for advanced AI
items.summary: OpenAI helps build shared standards for advanced AI, supporting evaluation frameworks, safety practices, and global cooperation through the Appia Foundation.

items.title: Fika Jobs raises $4M to build a video-first hiring platform where AI agents interview candidates
items.summary: Stockholm-based startup Fika Jobs is building a video-first hiring platform that combines AI interview agents with short-form video profiles, creating something that feels like a cross between LinkedIn and TikTok.

items.title: The $400 million machine powering the future of chipmaking

items.title: The running list: major tech layoffs in 2026 where employers cited AI
items.summary: A running look — in reverse chronological order — at the bigger tech companies that have announced significant layoffs this year with AI as a stated factor.
